choose_language:
[hi] Choose your language:
1. English
2. Kannada
3. Hindi
4. Telugu
ask_market_type:
[hi] Choose your market:
1. Local (India)
2. Global (Export)
3. Both
registration_restart: [hi] Okay, let us restart your registration details.
main_menu_farmer:
[hi] Hello {name}!
1. Sell Produce
2. My Listings
3. Wallet
4. Transaction History
5. My Orders
main_menu_buyer:
[hi] Hello {name}!
1. Browse & Buy
2. My Purchases
3. Wallet
4. Transaction History
sell_ask_qty: [hi] How many KG do you want to sell?
sell_ask_price: [hi] Price per KG in ₹? Current mandi rate: ₹{mandi_price}/kg
sell_price_warn: [hi] Your price ₹{price}/kg is unusual compared to mandi rate ₹{mandi}/kg. Reply YES to continue or NO to change.
sell_ask_pickup:
[hi] Pickup method:
1. At my farm
2. Nearest mandi
3. I will deliver
sell_ask_gi_tag: [hi] Add a GI tag for the global market or type SKIP.
buy_ask_crop: [hi] Choose what you want to buy:
buy_escrow_locked: [hi] Escrow locked for order {order_id}. Amount secured: ₹{amount}
buy_confirm_instruction: [hi] Send CONFIRM {order_id} when you receive the goods.
buy_no_listings: [hi] No live listings found for {crop} right now.
buy_invalid_listing: [hi] Please choose one of the shown listing numbers.
buy_listing_missing: [hi] That listing is no longer available.
buy_quantity_too_high: [hi] Requested quantity is higher than available stock. Max available: {max_qty}kg.
delivery_confirmed_buyer: [hi] Order {order_id} marked delivered. Thank you for confirming.
delivery_confirmed_farmer: [hi] Delivery confirmed for {order_id}. ₹{amount} credited after platform fee.
wallet_menu:
[hi] Wallet Menu:
1. Balance
2. Add Money
3. Withdraw
4. Mini Statement
wallet_add_confirm: [hi] A payment request for ₹{amount} is ready. Reply YES to confirm the top-up.
wallet_add_limit: [hi] This top-up would exceed your wallet balance limit.
wallet_invalid_upi: [hi] Please enter a valid UPI ID like name@bank or 9876543210@upi.
my_listings_empty: [hi] You do not have any listings yet.
my_orders_empty: [hi] You do not have any orders yet.
insufficient_balance: [hi] Insufficient balance. You have ₹{balance}, but need ₹{required}.
invalid_choice: [hi] Please choose a number between 1 and {max}.
session_timeout: [hi] Your session timed out. Send MENU to continue.
error_generic: [hi] Something went wrong. Please try again.
action_cancelled: [hi] Action cancelled. Reply MENU to continue.
notification_escrow_locked: [hi] Payment of ₹{amount} is secured. Please deliver by {deadline}.
notification_wallet_credited: [hi] ₹{amount} added to your wallet. New balance: ₹{balance}
notification_listing_expiring: [hi] Your {crop} listing expired or is expiring soon. {qty}kg is still unsold.
notification_price_alert: [hi] {crop} prices dropped to ₹{price}/kg in your area.
notification_order_dispatched: Order {order_id} for {crop} has been dispatched by the farmer.
notification_delivery_confirmed: Delivery confirmed for order {order_id}. ₹{amount} has been released to your wallet.
notification_delivery_recorded: Delivery for order {order_id} is now confirmed. Escrow of ₹{amount} has been closed.
